div.h3: Sorry, no one answered this survey yet.

a.class: btn btn-secondary d-print-none mt-1 ms-auto me-1
a.title: Cross-Tabulation

div.p: Select two questions to see how their answers relate to each other.

div.t-attf-class: d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center mb-1 collapse show o_survey_results_question_#{question.id}

t.t-if: survey.scoring_type != 'no_scoring' and (question.answer_numerical_box or question.answer_date or question.answer_datetime or any([a.is_correct for a in question.suggested_answer_ids]))

span.class: badge d-flex gap-1 ms-0 me-1 text-info text-start border rounded
badge d-flex gap-1 ms-0 me-1 text-info text-start border rounded
badge d-flex gap-1 ms-0 me-1 text-info text-start border rounded

a.class: o_survey_results_data_tab nav-link btn btn-light py-1 px-2 active
o_survey_results_data_tab nav-link btn btn-light py-1 px-2 active
o_survey_results_data_tab nav-link btn btn-light py-1 px-2

a.t-attf-class: btn btn-outline-primary dropdown-toggle #{'active' if search_finished else ''}
btn btn-outline-primary dropdown-toggle #{'active' if search_passed_or_failed else ''}

template.name: Question: number or date (and time) result (numerical_box or date or datetime)

div.t-attf-class: tab-pane #{'active' if not question_answered else ''} table-responsive
tab-pane #{'active' if not question_answered else ''} table-responsive

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-primary mx-0 my-3 o_survey_question_answers_show_btn

h2.t-attf-class: #{'text-success' if nps.get('nps_score', 0) > 0 else 'text-danger' if nps.get('nps_score', 0) < 0 else 'text-muted'}
